2604.23231.title: Toward Polymorphic Backdoor against Semantic Communication via Intensity-Based Poisoning
2604.23231.paper_summary: Semantic Communication (SC) backdoor attacks aim to utilize triggers to manipulate the system into producing predetermined outputs via backdoored shared knowledge. Current SC backdoors adopt monomorphic paradigms with single attack target, which suffers from limited attack diversity, efficiency, and flexibility in heterogeneous downstream scenarios. To overcome the limitations, we propose SemBugger, a polymorphic SC backdoor. By dynamically adjusting the trigger intensity, SemBugger finely-grained controls over the SC knowledge to generate diverse malicious results from the system. Specifically, SemBugger is realized through a multi-effect poisoning-training framework. It introduces graded-intensity triggers to poison training data and optimizes SC systems with hierarchical malicious loss. The trained system's knowledge dynamically adapts to trigger intensity in inputs to yield target outputs, all while preserving transmission fidelity for benign samples. Moreover, to augment SC security, we propose a provable robustness defense that resists SemBugger's homogeneous attacks through a controlled noise mechanism. It operates via strategically adding noise in SC inputs, and we formally provide a theoretical lower bound on the defense efficacy. Experiments across diverse SC models and benchmark datasets indicate that SemBugger attains high attack efficacy while maintaining the regular functionality of SC systems. Meanwhile, the designed defense effectively neutralizes SemBugger attacks.
2604.23231.paper_summary_zh: 語意通信（SC）後門攻擊旨在利用觸發器操控系統，以透過後門共享知識產生預定的輸出。當前的 SC 後門採用單一攻擊目標的單態範式，這在異質下游場景中面臨攻擊多樣性、效率和靈活性有限的問題。為了克服這些限制，我們提出了 SemBugger，一種多態 SC 後門。通過動態調整觸發器強度，SemBugger 對 SC 知識進行精細控制，以從系統生成多樣的惡意結果。具體而言，SemBugger 是通過一個多效應毒化訓練框架實現的。它引入分級強度的觸發器來毒化訓練數據，並通過分層的惡意損失來優化 SC 系統。訓練後的系統知識會根據輸入中的觸發器強度動態調整，以產生目標輸出，同時保持對良性樣本的傳輸保真度。此外，為了增強 SC 安全性，我們提出了一種可證明的魯棒性防禦，通過控制噪聲機制抵抗 SemBugger 的同質攻擊。它通過在 SC 輸入中策略性地添加噪聲來運作，我們正式提供了防禦效能的理論下限。針對各種 SC 模型和基準數據集的實驗表明，SemBugger 在保持 SC 系統常規功能的同時，達到了高效的攻擊效果。與此同時，設計的防禦有效地中和了 SemBugger 攻擊。
2604.23231.author: Xiao Yang et.al.
2604.23231.authors: Xiao Yang, Yuni Lai, Gaolei Li, Jun Wu, Kai Zhou, Jianhua Li, Mingzhe Chen
